title: F&A Aquatic Variants
description: A Fossils and Archeology Resource Pack that brings skin variants to some aquatic animals.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afde658ac3b55cd3b100fe35d67dbe7ae83e68ed_0.webp)

This Resource Pack aims to give Fossils and Archeology’s marine animals extra skin variety, adding more skin diversity to your park/sanctuary

---

**Adds Skin Variants to the following mobs**
- **_Ichthyosaurus_**

_Note: If you pick up and release the mob with a water bucket, it's textures will change_

---
**ETF (Entity Texture Features)** or **Optifine** is **_Requred_** for this Resource Pack to work

> **All The Textures Was Made By, Din_0\
> All rights to The F/A Dev Team**
## Please contact me if there's any issues, NOT the F/A Dev Team
